Package org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge.symbol

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractFillableEdgeSymbol
    This class represents a edge symbol that is able to fill its interior part.
    ArrowEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "arrow" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    CircleEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "circle" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    DiamondEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "diamond" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    EdgeSymbol
    This class is the base class for the symbols that will be paint at the ends of edges.
    RectangleEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "rectangle" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    SlotInEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "slot-in" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    SlotOutEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "slot-out" symbols that will be paint in the ends of edges.
    TriangleEdgeSymbol
    This class represents the "triangle" symbol that will be paint in the ends of edges.
